summary: AI compliance agents for ingredient, formula, label, and market-entry checks.
editor_note: The useful idea is turning compliance into product-specific checks instead of another spreadsheet of regulations. Certo shows ingredient extraction, CAS mapping, formula checks, SDS/PIF/CPSR generation, market readiness, audit trails, and daily regulatory feeds across 70+ countries. Unlike generic legal copilots, it narrows the agent to consumer-product labels and supplier documents.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Certo: AI compliance agents for ingredient, formula, label, and market-entry checks.
Certo shows ingredient extraction, CAS mapping, formula checks, SDS/PIF/CPSR generation, market readiness, audit trails, and daily regulatory feeds across 70+ countries.

market_context.primary_user: Business teams evaluating workflow software for a specific operating function.
market_context.why_now: Recent source-backed funding and public product evidence make compliance, consumer goods, regulatory worth tracking.

risks.claim: Continued tracking should verify whether the public product evidence turns into durable customer adoption beyond the currently visible surface.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and funding-source review.
